sections.title: 1. Data Controller
sections.content: Drevaia Digital acts as the data controller for the personal data voluntarily provided by users, in accordance with Law 1581 of 2012 (Colombia) and applicable regulations when appropriate.

sections.title: 2. Nature of Content
sections.content: All content is informative, reflective, and educational. It does not replace psychological therapy, medical diagnosis, professional treatment, or legal or financial advice.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content is protected by copyright. Purchase or access does not transfer intellectual property rights. Use is personal and non-transferable. Copying, reselling, distributing, or modifying content without prior written authorization is prohibited.

sections.title: 4. Purchases and Refunds
sections.content: Due to the digital nature of the products, no refunds are offered once the content is delivered or downloaded, except in case of provable technical error or duplicate purchase. Hotmart may apply its own conditions according to the product.

sections.title: 5. Data Protection
sections.content: Only data provided voluntarily (for example, email) and basic technical data (cookies) are collected. Purposes: product delivery, communications, support, and legal compliance. We do not sell personal data to third parties for commercial purposes.

sections.title: 6. User Rights
sections.content: You may request access, rectification, updating, deletion, or revocation of consent by writing to: noadrevaia@gmail.com

sections.title: 7. International Transfers
sections.content: Data may be stored outside Colombia under adequate security standards.

sections.title: 8. Security
sections.content: Reasonable measures are applied to protect data against unauthorized access or losses.

sections.title: 9. Minors
sections.content: Content is not directed at minors under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

sections.title: 10. Updates
sections.content: This Policy may be updated when necessary. The current version is always published on this page.

sections.title: Cookie Usage
sections.content: This site uses technical, functional, and third-party cookies (Payhip, Hotmart, Tidio), as well as analytical cookies to improve user experience.

sections.title: Types of Cookies
sections.content: Technical cookies: necessary for site operation. Functional cookies: user preferences. Analytical cookies: usage statistics. Third-party cookies: external integrations.

sections.title: Cookie Management
sections.content: Users can manage or delete cookies from their browser settings. When legally required (EU/EEA users), consent will be requested before using non-essential cookies.

sections.title: Digital Products
sections.content: Due to the intangible and non-reproducible nature of digital products (eBooks, courses, downloadable content), no refunds are made once delivery or download is completed.

sections.title: Exceptions
sections.content: Exceptional refunds will be considered in the following cases: (a) Provable technical error preventing access to content, (b) Duplicate purchase due to system error, (c) Product significantly different from its description.

sections.title: Request Process
sections.content: To request an exceptional refund, contact noadrevaia@gmail.com within 7 days of purchase, including: order number, problem description, and supporting evidence.

sections.title: Third-Party Platforms
sections.content: For purchases made through Payhip or Hotmart, the specific refund policies of each platform apply, which prevail over this policy.
